Apr 08, 2019

Doğuş University Research and Development Oriented Computer Laboratory Has Been Opened

Apr 05, 2019

ASSOC. PROF. DOĞAN ERBAHAR'S STUDY IS IN THE COVER OF THE WORLD-FAMOUS CHEMICAL COMMUNICATION!

Department of Mechanical Engineering member Assoc. Dr. Doğan Erbahar’s latest study has been published in the field of Chemical Communications, the publication of the Royal Society of Chemistry, one of the most prestigious scientific publishers in the world.

Mar 22, 2019

Our university has become a member of Turkey PANDA

Prof. Dr. Kazem Azizi, lecturer in the department of Physics, has become a member of Doğuş University and Turkey PANDA experiment (Anti-Proton Annihilation Darmsdat). PANDA experiment, which has been founded in Darmstad, Germany, GSI Helmholtzzentrum für Schwerionenforschung, aims to be one of the most important experiments in the field of hadron physics worldwide.
